summary: Phase 2 multi-page routing verified. All 10 routes render with unique <title>, single H1, and unique meta description. Navbar links (Fleet, Services dropdown -> 4 service detail pages, Service Areas, About, Book Now, logo) all navigate correctly. Unknown route /this-does-not-exist redirects to /. Booking form on /contact submits successfully (HTTP 200, email_sent=false as designed, inquiry persists) and shows 'Inquiry received!' success toast. Admin /admin: wrong password -> 'Invalid password' toast; correct password ('92Limo!Admin2026') -> dashboard with bookings table, stats (Total/New), and status select that updates status with 'Status updated.' toast. Mobile (390px): no horizontal overflow, mobile-menu-toggle opens nav with service sub-links, sticky bar shows Call+Book, sticky-book-btn -> /contact. No Emergent badge/watermark anywhere. No broken images. Backend pytest regression: 13/13 PASS.

issues: Date and Time inputs still use the browser-native picker (input type=date/time) instead of a shadcn Calendar/TimePicker. Functional but inconsistent with the luxury dark theme. Carried over from iteration 1.

Review-request mentions selecting 'Luxury Sedan' but the actual options are 'Executive Sedan', 'Mercedes-Benz S-Class / BMW 7 Series', 'Luxury SUV — Chevrolet Suburban / GMC Yukon XL', 'Premium SUV — Cadillac Escalade ESV', 'Mercedes Sprinter Executive Van'. Naming mismatch with the request copy is cosmetic; UI works correctly.

action_items: Optional: replace native date/time inputs with shadcn Calendar/TimePicker for theme consistency (low priority, same as iter 1).
Optional: set RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env to enable real email delivery — current email_sent=false is by design.
No required action — all critical multi-page routing, SEO, booking, admin and mobile flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Per-page <title> and <meta name=description> are correctly swapped on route change via the Seo component (verified by reading document.title after each navigation).
Every page renders exactly one <h1> — good for SEO.
404/unknown routes correctly redirect to / via <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />}>.
Sonner toaster repositioned to top-right (App.js) — addresses iteration 1 design feedback about overlap with stat cards. Good fix.
Service select has 2 DOM elements (native <option> + visible shadcn Radix option) — minor accessibility nuance but not a bug; tests must use role=option to disambiguate.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (navigation, SEO, booking form, admin, mobile sticky+menu all pass)

seed_data_creation: Created 4 bookings via API/UI during testing (1 pytest TEST_John Smith + 2 UI_TEST_Iter2 from booking form + 1 UI_TEST2_user). All cleaned up at end of run via pymongo delete_many on TEST_/UI_TEST prefixes. bookings collection is empty after cleanup (count=0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_limo_api.py is the regression baseline (13 tests, all pass). Multi-page React app has these working routes: /, /fleet, /services, /airport-transportation, /corporate-transportation, /hourly-chauffeur, /wedding-transportation, /service-areas, /about, /contact, /admin. Booking form lives on /contact. Vehicle Type options are Executive Sedan / Mercedes-Benz S-Class / Luxury SUV / Premium SUV / Mercedes Sprinter Executive Van (NOT 'Luxury Sedan'). Service Type options: Airport Transfer, Corporate Travel, Hourly Chauffeur, Point-to-Point, Wedding Transportation, Group Sprinter Van, Long-Distance Trip. Use get_by_role('option', name=...) when picking from Radix selects because there are also hidden native <option> duplicates. All test bookings cleaned; new agents should re-seed via API.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
